channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 15th June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please lift and relay x1 sunken kerb stone 900x100x40mm stats required (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 15th June
item.description:
NWD Give and take carriage way pothole 500x400x70mm plus x1 NSD (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 15th June
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole 600x500x44mm (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: Street light covered by tree branches, 15th June
item.description:
The Street light post No 2, out side No9 Chaffinch Close GL3 1DQ, is obscured by branches of a tree, and the branches are also going across the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chaffinch Close, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 15th June
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole 600x400x40mm (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 15th June
item.description:
NWD Give and take carriage way pothole 600x450x70mm (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: This tree was identified for reduction 3 years ago. Nothing has been done., 15th June
item.description:
The tree adjacent to Lansdowne Road and Lypiatt Lane continues to cause damage. It has been slated for significant reduction for 3 years. Several weeks ago two Highways employees stated it was being escalated because the work was clearly essential and they did not understand the delays. Unfortunately there is still no contact or sign of activity. Is there any way to receive an update on this case?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Lansdown Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Centre of road opposite 18 John Daniels Way, 15th June
item.description:
18 John Daniels Way Churchdown
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Daniels Way, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 15th June
item.description:
Give and take 28 day please cut back brambles and vegetation back to boundary approx 100 meters x 1 meters footway closure (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large number of nitrous oxide canisters, 15th June
item.description:
Positioned at clip.mats.dogs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hyde Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in pavement problem, 15th June
item.description:
Please could you raise a request for a safety inspection on Prestbury Road, the footpath around the tree is uneven.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 15th June
item.description:
2 HOUR MAKE SAFE give and take PLEASE REPOSITION SCHOOL SIGN WITH HAS SLIPPED DOWN ON LAMP POST (Damaged Street Furniture)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Timetable not accurate, 15th June
item.description:
The timetable was updated 31/05/26 but the R bus has been left off, leading people to think the bus doesn’t stop here anymore.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass, 15th June
item.description:
Broken glass by bench in Sanford park by fountain

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa flytipped, 15th June
item.description:
Sofa needs collecting from verge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-14, Pittville Circus Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Christmas trees, 15th June
item.description:
Been here since new year. Reported before Please take away

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Portland Square, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: We have no bus shelter since a car dismantled it during Cheltenham race week. We are getting soaked, waiting for the bus, in the rain., 14th June
item.description:
On the corner of Nine Elms Road, opposite Greyhound Pub, going into Gloucester City Centre. This has been going on for more than three months now.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement is slumping down and disintergrating due to being used continually for parking from bournside school. It is very dangerous as diffrent levels and trip hazzard, 14th June
item.description:
Behind the property’s of 1 and 1A Winton Road ( road to the rear of the properties) the foot path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Winton Close, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
